name: product
description: Product management toolkit for Claude Code. Per-feature cycle Discover → Define → Spec → Validate, plus rare market-scan (quarterly anchor) and prioritize (backlog operation). Artifacts (HYP/PRD/SPEC/VAL/SCAN) are versioned and cross-link to ADRs from architect. Two skills: product-conventions (artifact rules), product-cycle (methodology). Soft hooks enforce prerequisites and size budgets.
